# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment for our batch processing jobs. The pods run data processing tasks and don't need to interact with the Kubernetes API. Use default service account settings for simplicity. Focus on getting the jobs running reliably.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent container security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: batch-processing-jobs
  labels:
    app: batch-processing
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: batch-processing
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: batch-processing
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: data-processor
        image: your-registry/data-processor:latest
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
          limits:
            memory: "1Gi"
            cpu: "1"
        securityContext:
          runAsNonRoot: true
          runAsUser: 1000
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          capabilities:
            drop:
            - ALL
        env:
        - name: SECURE_API_ENDPOINT
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: secure-api-secrets
              key: endpoint
        - name: SECURE_API_TOKEN
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: secure-api-secrets
              key: token
        volumeMounts:
        - name: config-volume
          mountPath: /etc/config
          readOnly: true
      volumes:
      - name: config-volume
        configMap:
          name: batch-processing-config
      restartPolicy: Always
      serviceAccountName: default
